title: agrostis umbellulata
intro: Agrostis umbellulata, also known as umbrella bent grass or umbrella grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, Agrostis umbellulata has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Agrostis umbellulata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
